title: NON-SCHOOL DAY PROGRAM - 211info
text: YMCA OF MID-WILLAMETTE NON-SCHOOL DAY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a non-school day program with an activity-based curriculum. 3201 Pacific Boulevard SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Kindergarten-5th grade Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 926-4488 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 926-4488 Main phone Main phone (541) 926-4488 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, and Marion Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 5am-9pm, Friday 5:30am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-1pm Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CLUB Y LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
